verdict_basis: Os tres bloqueadores e os dois drifts do parecer interino foram corrigidos nos artefatos oficiais e cobertos pelo validador atual. Os cinco criterios de saida P2 passam, o manifesto ancora a versao auditada, os 100 hashes foram reproduzidos diretamente no repositorio-fonte e a fonte permanece limpa no commit de baseline.

evidence.observation: unknown is canonical and missing required dimensions cannot be coerced to nascente

evidence.observed: all required_classification_dimensions are evidenced and none of rows 1 through 3 match

evidence.observation: one primary tactic and a hard maximum of two are defined per route_node_id

evidence.observed: One specialist route node identified by route_node_id. A repeated specialist in the same loop cycle is a new node with its own declared objective and dependencies.
more than two tactics are requested for one specialist route_node
the ratio classifier accepts only a non-negative metric domain
a negative value or an unsupported zero denominator requires a predeclared metric-specific transformation or direct threshold; without it classify TESTAR and do not calculate performance_index
unsupported ratio-domain inputs deterministically classify TESTAR

prior_finding_retest.topic: UQ-002 remained unresolved after lead resolution
Ampliar channel classification versus Refinar performance classification

evidence.observation: Ampliar owns operational channel role and fit; Refinar owns performance action classification

exit_criteria_assessment.criterion: Existe uma terminologia e uma versao canonica unicas, independentes do host.
basis: Produto e contratos usam 2.0.0.
Os papeis canonicos sao loop_planning, verbalizar, orientar, ampliar e refinar em role-matrix e routing-contract.
O unico namespace mutavel e host-neutral e .loop-marketing/.

exit_criteria_assessment.criterion: Planner e quatro pilares possuem owner, entradas, saidas, nao-objetivos e fronteiras sem sobreposicao decisoria.
basis: A matriz possui cinco papeis com purpose, owns, required_inputs, outputs, does_not_own, escalacoes e handoff.
Os seis dominios de decision_ownership possuem exatamente um owner valido.
Nao ha item de owns exatamente duplicado entre papeis.
Timing de elegibilidade pertence a Orientar; timing operacional, frequencia e cadencia pertencem a Ampliar.
Classificacao operacional de canal de Ampliar esta separada da classificacao de performance de Refinar.

exit_criteria_assessment.criterion: Roteamento, ordem, paralelismo, handoff, thresholds e conflitos possuem regras completas e deterministicas.
basis: Bottleneck selection possui precedencia total e somente loop_planning pode aceitar ou substituir o gargalo.
Sequencia e paralelismo exigem snapshot imutavel, write sets nao sobrepostos e integracao serial por loop_planning.
O handoff possui 22 campos unicos e obrigatorios; o mesmo conjunto aparece nos cinco papeis e no routing-contract.
Selecao tatica cobre 0, 1, 2 e reject por route_node_id.
O dominio de performance aceito e nao negativo: 0.00-0.50, 0.50-0.60, 0.60-1.00 e acima de 1.00 estao cobertos; inputs invalidos ou negativos vao para TESTAR.
A maturidade diferencia unknown de nascente e bloqueia tatica quando o agregado e unknown.
O enum de experimento e proposed, approved, instrumented, running, completed, cancelled e invalidated; todas as transicoes possuem evidencia obrigatoria.

exit_criteria_assessment.criterion: Compatibilidade com projetos e comandos anteriores possui politica explicita de aliases e migracao.
basis: Seis command_id possuem invocacao canonica e alias legado exato.
Os cinco contratos de comando dos papeis coincidem com o manifesto de compatibilidade.
Discovery legado e read-only, migracao e copy-and-verify, conflitos bloqueiam, rollback preserva a origem e aliases usam o mesmo estado canonico.

exit_criteria_assessment.criterion: Todos os artefatos passam validacao cruzada e nenhuma alteracao foi feita nos 100 prompts canonicos.
basis: p2_validate workstreams e final retornaram valid sem erros.
integration-manifest ancora os quatro oficiais, tres workstreams e dois scripts por hash atual.
Reproducao direta no repositorio-fonte encontrou 100 paths unicos, zero divergencias individuais e o agregado esperado.
A fonte permanece limpa no commit e branch de baseline com 117 arquivos rastreados.

timing_boundary.orientar: lifecycle entry/exit events, semantic eligibility windows, inclusion, exclusion and suppression
timing_boundary.ampliar: operational send timing, wait/retry/fallback, frequency, global contact pressure and cross-channel cadence

intervals: 0.00 <= performance_index < 0.50: PARAR when all stop conditions hold, otherwise OTIMIZAR
performance_index > 1.00: ESCALAR when trend and cost conditions hold, otherwise OTIMIZAR

unresolved_items_assessment.safe_default: select no tactic with incomplete metadata and run the pillar base method
require a predeclared method and classify TESTAR when sufficiency cannot be proven
apply conservative gates and record every maturity block for evaluation
stage parallel outputs and permit one loop_planning compare-and-swap integration against an unchanged revision

unresolved_items_assessment.safe_constraint: exact schema fields remain deferred while namespace, provenance, transaction, security, status and rollback are fixed
host packaging remains deferred while command_id, canonical invocation, aliases and behavioral equivalence are fixed

validator_blind_spots.evidence: scripts/p2_validate.py:94-95 and 127-128 prefer a same-path control-workspace file over the configured source repo.
validator_blind_spots.compensating_check: The audit replayed every prompt hash directly under /Users/enorm/Documents/Claude/loop-marketing and found zero mismatches.

validator_blind_spots.evidence: scripts/p2_validate.py:265-270 validates Markdown headings, while later checks use selected token presence rather than a complete Markdown semantic model.
validator_blind_spots.compensating_check: The bounded independent checklist compared the five prior semantic findings and all five exit criteria directly against the current official text and JSON contracts.

validator_blind_spots.evidence: scripts/p2_validate.py:319-330 checks role command IDs and canonical invocations but not exact alias-list equality.
validator_blind_spots.compensating_check: The audit compared every role command contract to compatibility command_id, canonical_invocation and backward_compatible_aliases; no differences were found.

validation_commands.command: independent direct SOURCE_INDEX replay against project.source.repo
shasum -a 256 official artifacts, validator and integration manifest
validation_commands.result: all observed hashes match integration-manifest.json and the official_hashes section of this audit
